name: io.github.bch1212/injectshield
description: Prompt-injection firewall for AI agents — scan untrusted text before LLM calls.

environmentVariables.name: INJECTSHIELD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from https://injectshield.dev (free tier: 10K req/mo).

environmentVariables.name: INJECTSHIELD_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL for self-hosted deployments.
